subject: Urgent Request: Backend Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Riksdata
ROLE: Senior Backend Engineer
START: 2023-12-08
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / on-site
RATE: 925 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, GCP, BigQuery, RabbitMQ and LlamaIndex.

Key requirements:
• Java
• GCP
• BigQuery
• RabbitMQ
• LlamaIndex

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Johan Bergström
Konsultchef
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 76 456 78 90
